name: Asset Browser Tools
summary: Includes a Hello View and PSD Parser Skill for plugin import testing.

summaryI18n.zh: 包含 Hello View 和 PSD Parser Skill，用于测试插件导入。
summaryI18n.en: Includes a Hello View and PSD Parser Skill for plugin import testing.

author: Locus Test
description: Plugin import test entry with a Hello View and PSD Parser Skill. It can be installed from the registry, a release archive, or directly from the repository link.

descriptionI18n.zh: 插件导入测试条目，包含 Hello View 和 PSD Parser Skill，可从注册表、release 包或仓库链接直接安装。
descriptionI18n.en: Plugin import test entry with a Hello View and PSD Parser Skill. It can be installed from the registry, a release archive, or directly from the repository link.
